text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder may have come out on top, but your performance was
still incredible, Spe.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
What are your thoughts on the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe? You
certainly have a chance, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I was in tip-top shape and practiced lots and lots... I really, truly gave my all in that race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But Grass still passed me. No matter how hard I ran, I couldn't get the
lead back.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
After that race, it's crystal clear... I wouldn't win the Arc even if I did
enter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, Special Week's dream of being the best in Japan was a
vague one—more of an idea than a goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But with the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe in sight, she thought her dream
was finally taking form... which makes this loss all the harder.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right... We'll put the Arc aside for now and focus on domestic
races instead.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But I would still watch this year's race. Just because you're not ready
now doesn't mean you'll never be.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But I would still watch this year's race. Just because you're not ready
now doesn't mean you'll never be.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Leeet's gooo!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Riiing! Riiing! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Allo! Bonjour!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: "Hello, El. I'm not interrupting your training, am I?"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I was just about to take a break! I need some grub, and fast!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: "Hehe, well, I'm glad you've still got your appetite."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass, good job at the Takarazuka Kinen! That final stretch especially
was intense, astonishing—downright amazing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And sooo inspiring to watch! My competitive spirit was setting my
whole body on fire!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: "Oh my, I'm honored to hear you feel that way."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Watching you... Spe... all our friends running so brilliantly—that is
what kept my own dream alight in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
For that, I must repay all of you... And I will. I shall make my dream
come true, and stand above you all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: "Wow! Sounds like you're as competitive as ever!"

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You're also approaching your goal of being the strongest, no?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Just three more months until the Arc. By then, I'll be even faster than I
am now!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And with that race... I'll show everyone that I'm the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: "It sounds like you'll have no problem giving this race your all."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: My all, huh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Guys! You have my gratitude, appreciation—my deepest thanks for
seeing me off!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Are you sure you don't want us to go to the airport with you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All bien! It's a weekday, right? Make sure you learn lots and looots in
class!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Don't you worry! I'll study enough for both of us, so use that energy to
give the Japanese racing fans a real show!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Having a classmate taking on the world will be something I share with
pride.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I await good news from overseas. And don't you worry, I shall ensure
my achievements reach you as well!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess I... better go now...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I really... should get going...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El, surely you don't have to leave right now, do you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe... In that case, to start your journey off right...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wh-what are you all doing?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Like I said, we're setting the mood for your journey. ♪ Watch out, if
you don't pay attention, we'll pass you.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: A special send-off from all of us, eh? Hehe, a splendid idea indeed!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Here I gooo! I'm sending you off with all I've got! Urrrraaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Count me in too! Draaaauuugh!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oho, what a motivated bunch.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait a sec! Are we racing for real?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... El, it's your turn.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Show us the run of the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I am the Umamusume who will be the world's strongest! If you're gonna take me on...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You better be ready for a fight! Yaaauuugh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You're right, I left all my fears behind me in Japan. I'm giving the Prix
de l'Arc de Triomphe everything I have!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: "Good. I cannot wait to see you shining in your full glory."

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"And someday... I hope to race with the El I see at the Prix de l'Arc de
Triomphe. ♪"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, right!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
At long last, today's the day that Japan's El Condor Pasa takes on the
top racers of the world!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
In addition to viewers the world over, two thousand of her fans are
here, hoping their cheers will push her on.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa... Will she be the one to make history—to go where
none of Japan's racers have gone before and snatch the gold?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: (This is it. The race that will prove I'm the world's strongest...)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And now, the Umamusume on everyone's minds enters the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Coming off six wins with only one second-place race! France's
strongest, Montjeu, steps onto the track!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Montjeu...

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa... I've heard much about you. Including how you've
traveled across the globe to win this race.

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text:
I hope you will show me just what the Umamusume of Japan are
capable of.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Don't you worry, I'll give you a race to remember!

text_block_list.name: Montjeu
text_block_list.text: <May this race be our best.>

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The pinnacle of racing—the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe. My opponents
include top-class racers from all over the world, including France's
strongest, Montjeu...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The players have stepped into the ring. All that's left is to take them
on, show them my strength, and emerge victorious... as the world's
strongest!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Will Japan's El Condor Pasa be able to snatch victory from the world's
top racers, including Montjeu?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Leaving the paddock behind, our racers ready themselves for the Prix
de l'Arc de Triomphe!
